raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to check the section centrally includes verifying whether the methodological and evaluative claims cohere logically.","R1.3":"The passage reports metrics and comparative claims, so checking whether the stated claims are supported by the reported results is a central responsibility.","R1.6":"Because the delegation is broad and the artifact is draft prose, sentence-level clarity, grammar, flow, and concision are central expected responsibilities.","RX.1":"Any projection of a terse delegation must preserve uncertainty about the intended depth and type of checking.","RX.2":"The section contains claims about improvement, generalization, and baseline strength, making overclaim avoidance always relevant.","RX.3":"The agent must restrict responsibility to projecting the delegation rather than performing the requested check.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported methodological conclusions downstream.","RX.5":"Responsibility assignments should remain traceable to explicit cues in the delegation and artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general request to check the section centrally includes verifying whether the methodological and evaluative claims cohere logically.
rationale.R1.3: The passage reports metrics and comparative claims, so checking whether the stated claims are supported by the reported results is a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation is broad and the artifact is draft prose, sentence-level clarity, grammar, flow, and concision are central expected responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of a terse delegation must preserve uncertainty about the intended depth and type of checking.
rationale.RX.2: The section contains claims about improvement, generalization, and baseline strength, making overclaim avoidance always relevant.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must restrict responsibility to projecting the delegation rather than performing the requested check.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported methodological conclusions downstream.
rationale.RX.5: Responsibility assignments should remain traceable to explicit cues in the delegation and artifact.
